label: repeated_action_eventually_error
description: A2.4 repetition bound — paper_gain fires only on the FIRST relevant test in a no-progress segment. Rerunning the same test without evidence delta gives paper_gain=False → err=True. Scientist Answer3.md: 'un agent peut relancer le même test 20 fois sans jamais être pénalisé' is the failure mode to prevent. t=0 reads src/a.py (progress). t=1 first test_run in segment → paper_gain=True, no err (|T|=1). t=2-3 repeated identical test_runs → paper_gain=False → err=True each time.
